chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1268 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of case(Priority) 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of CMA 4979/25 3.For hearing of main case. 03-09-2025 Mr. Zafar Ali Lanjar, Advocate for the petitioners. M/s Agha Athar Hussain Pathan, Assistant A.G and Gulzar Ahmed Malano, APG a/w SIP Khadim Hussain of P.S, Naushahro Feroze. **** Mr. Badaruddin Memon, Advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondent No.5, taken on record. Statements filed by official respondents No.2&3 are taken on record and copies whereof are provided to counsel for the petitioners. In his statement, respondent No.3 has submitted that the case is finally challaned and presently pending before the competent Court of law. After such statements, counsel for the petitioners, under instructions, does not press this petition and submits that the petitioners will approach the trial Court for proper relief available under sections 249-A or 265-K CrPC, as the case may be. Order accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
